subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Primal Point unto him who hath believed in God, hath turned towards the holy sanctuary, and hath hastened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدن نقطه الاولی الی الذی آمن بالله و توجه الی شطر القدس و سرع فی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
